---
title: "Climate"
author: "Winson"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
climate <- readRDS("data/combined_all_climate_data_2016_2024(7).rds")
head(climate)
```

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(lubridate)

monthly_data <- climate %>%
  mutate(month_date = floor_date(date, "month")) %>%
  group_by(month_date) %>%
  summarise(
    avg_temp_min = mean(temp_min, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_temp_max = mean(temp_max, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_temp_med = mean(temp_med, na.rm = TRUE),
    
    avg_precip_min = mean(precip_min, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_precip_max = mean(precip_max, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_precip_med = mean(precip_med, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_precip_total = sum(precip_tot, na.rm = TRUE),
    
    avg_pressao_min = mean(pressao_min, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_pressao_max = mean(pressao_max, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_pressao_med = mean(pressao_med, na.rm = TRUE),
    
    avg_umid_min = mean(umid_min, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_umid_max = mean(umid_max, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_umid_med = mean(umid_med, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>% 
  arrange(month_date) %>%
  mutate(
    month_year = format(month_date, "%b-%Y"),
    avr_temp_mean = (avg_temp_min + avg_temp_max) / 2,
    avr_precip_mean = (avg_precip_min + avg_precip_max) / 2,
    avr_pressao_mean = (avg_pressao_min + avg_pressao_max) / 2,
    avr_umid_mean = (avg_umid_min + avg_umid_max) / 2
  ) %>%
  select(month_year, everything(), -month_date) 

monthly_data
```

```{r}
monthly_data_shifted <- climate %>%
  mutate(month_date = floor_date(date, "month")) %>%
  
  # group by geocodigo AND month
  group_by(geocodigo, month_date) %>%
  summarise(
    avg_temp_min = mean(temp_min, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_temp_max = mean(temp_max, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_temp_med = mean(temp_med, na.rm = TRUE),
    
    avg_precip_min = mean(precip_min, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_precip_max = mean(precip_max, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_precip_med = mean(precip_med, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_precip_total = sum(precip_tot, na.rm = TRUE),
    
    avg_pressao_min = mean(pressao_min, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_pressao_max = mean(pressao_max, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_pressao_med = mean(pressao_med, na.rm = TRUE),
    
    avg_umid_min = mean(umid_min, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_umid_max = mean(umid_max, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_umid_med = mean(umid_med, na.rm = TRUE),
    
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  
  arrange(geocodigo, month_date) %>%
  
  # create month labels BEFORE lagging
  mutate(
    target_month_year = format(month_date, "%b-%Y"),
    lagged_month_year = lag(target_month_year)
  ) %>%
  
  # lag WITHIN each geocodigo
  group_by(geocodigo) %>%
  mutate(
    avg_temp_min = lag(avg_temp_min),
    avg_temp_max = lag(avg_temp_max),
    avg_temp_med = lag(avg_temp_med),
    
    avg_precip_min = lag(avg_precip_min),
    avg_precip_max = lag(avg_precip_max),
    avg_precip_med = lag(avg_precip_med),
    avg_precip_total = lag(avg_precip_total),
    
    avg_pressao_min = lag(avg_pressao_min),
    avg_pressao_max = lag(avg_pressao_max),
    avg_pressao_med = lag(avg_pressao_med),
    
    avg_umid_min = lag(avg_umid_min),
    avg_umid_max = lag(avg_umid_max),
    avg_umid_med = lag(avg_umid_med),
    
    # recompute AFTER lag
    avr_temp_mean = (avg_temp_min + avg_temp_max) / 2,
    avr_precip_mean = (avg_precip_min + avg_precip_max) / 2,
    avr_pressao_mean = (avg_pressao_min + avg_pressao_max) / 2,
    avr_umid_mean = (avg_umid_min + avg_umid_max) / 2
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  
  # remove rows where lag doesn't exist (first month per geocodigo)
  filter(!is.na(avg_temp_min)) %>%
  
  # reorder columns
  select(geocodigo, target_month_year, lagged_month_year, everything(), -month_date)

monthly_data_shifted
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)

climate_plot <- monthly_data_shifted %>%
  mutate(
    date = as.Date(paste0("01-", target_month_year), format = "%d-%b-%Y")
  ) %>%
  arrange(geocodigo, date)

climate_plot <- climate_plot %>%
  mutate(temp_z = scale(avr_temp_mean)[,1])

ggplot(climate_plot,
       aes(x = date, y = factor(geocodigo), fill = temp_z)) +
  geom_tile() +
  scale_fill_gradient2(
    low = "#3865ab",
    mid = "white",
    high = "#b82811",
    midpoint = 0, 
    limits = c(-4, 4)
  ) +
  scale_x_date(date_labels = "%Y-%m", date_breaks = "3 months") +
  labs(x = "Time", y = "Municipality", fill = "Intensity") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.text.y = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks = element_blank(),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 1)
  )
```
